calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Joseph Pugliese?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Have Judgment Entered Against Defendant Enrique Ovando
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alex Merchant, Esq., 415-294-4111, appearing for Joseph Pugliese, Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Hearing held. Mr. Elke questioned if one order is sufficient to satisfy the tentative ruling. The Court informed Mr. Elke that a separate order and separate judgment are required.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSEPH PUGLIESE Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Have Judgment Entered Against Defendant Enrique Ovando is GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
